name: 豆包图片视频去水印解析

pricing.note: Billable API. A user apikey is normally required.

authentication.note: Pass the apikey generated in the site user center as a request parameter.

call_examples.python:
import requests

params = {
  "url": "<MEDIA_SHARE_URL>",
  "apikey": "<YOUR_APIKEY>"
}
resp = requests.get("https://api.nycnm.cn/api/v2/doubao", params=params, timeout=30)
print(resp.text)
